task_completion.description: Define the 'GR-Soil-4in' material with the specified properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the eQUEST Material Properties dialog or spreadsheet with 'GR-Soil-4in' having Thickness 0.333, Conductivity 0.42, Density 75.0, and Specific Heat 0.25.

task_completion.description: Define the 'GR-Drainage-Mat' material with the specified properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the eQUEST Material Properties dialog or spreadsheet with 'GR-Drainage-Mat' having Thickness 0.042, Conductivity 0.03, Density 2.5, and Specific Heat 0.35.

task_completion.description: Define the 'GR-Insulation-R20' material with the specified properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the eQUEST Material Properties dialog or spreadsheet with 'GR-Insulation-R20' having Thickness 0.333, Conductivity 0.017, Density 1.5, and Specific Heat 0.25.

task_completion.description: Create a construction named 'Green-Roof-Assembly' combining the three materials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the eQUEST Construction Properties dialog or spreadsheet for 'Green-Roof-Assembly' with layers ordered from outside to inside: GR-Soil-4in, GR-Drainage-Mat, GR-Insulation-R20.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Green-Roof-Assembly' construction to all roof surfaces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the eQUEST interface (e.g., spreadsheet view for Roofs or component tree) where 'Green-Roof-Assembly' is selected as the construction for the roof surfaces.

task_completion.description: Run the annual simulation and save the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the eQUEST simulation progress/completion window, and evidence of the project being saved (e.g., File menu save action or save dialog).

integrity.description: Agent used the eQUEST GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with eQUEST dialogs, spreadsheets, and menus, rather than a text editor modifying the .inp file directly.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely ran the simulation within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation window appears in eQUEST showing the calculation progress or results, not just a terminal command.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply download or copy a pre-made .inp file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Step-by-step creation of materials and constructions is visible in the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 4StoreyBuilding model has 5 roof surfaces. The agent must create three materials with exact properties: 'GR-Soil-4in' (Thickness: 0.333, Conductivity: 0.42, Density: 75.0, Specific Heat: 0.25), 'GR-Drainage-Mat' (Thickness: 0.042, Conductivity: 0.03, Density: 2.5, Specific Heat: 0.35), and 'GR-Insulation-R20' (Thickness: 0.333, Conductivity: 0.017, Density: 1.5, Specific Heat: 0.25). These are combined into 'Green-Roof-Assembly' with layers ordered outside to inside: GR-Soil-4in, GR-Drainage-Mat, GR-Insulation-R20. All 5 roof surfaces must be assigned this construction.
